message:
fix(reactor): drop poll_events mutex guard before returning from EpollReactor::poll

The Mutex<PollEvents> guard was held until the end of the function,
which meant the lock remained held during the caller's processing of
the returned event count. Adding an explicit drop(poll_events) after
the iteration loop releases the lock immediately, allowing concurrent
poll() calls from other threads to proceed without unnecessary
contention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
